heading: Rank: commissioned officers serving under temporary appointments
label: 9222 Rank: commissioned officers serving under temporary appointments
text: The President may, in accordance with the needs of the Air Force or the Space Force, adjust dates of rank of commissioned officers of the Air Force or the Space Force serving in temporary grades.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)857210:506d(c) (last sentence).(last sentence), .Aug. 7, 1947, ch. 512, § 515(c)61 Stat. 907The word “commissioned” is inserted for clarity, since the source statute related only to commissioned officers. The words “in his discretion, from time to time” are omitted as surplusage.
Amendments2021— inserted “or the Space Force” after “the Air Force” in two places.Pub. L. 116–2832018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232section 8572 of this title

Effective Date of 2018 AmendmentAmendment by effective , with provision for the coordination of amendments and special rule for certain redesignations, see , set out as a note preceding .Pub. L. 115–232section 800 of Pub. L. 115–232section 3001 of this titleFeb. 1, 2019
